Clarity.justification: The generated diagram uses a sequence flow format which is different from the block-based layout of the ground truth. While it provides a detailed process flow, it might be less intuitive for non-technical stakeholders compared to the more visual and component-focused ground truth diagram.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram includes many of the same components and processes as the ground truth but lacks some specific elements and visual groupings present in the ground truth. Some connections and roles are not as explicitly defined.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram uses a different style and notation (sequence diagram) compared to the block diagram style of the ground truth. This results in inconsistencies in how components and processes are represented, making it structurally different.
